narrations.assessor: Adam reviews Travel — lost luggage for Grace
narrations.comms: Cara explains partial outcome to Grace — claim closed

extras.narration: Felix runs a quick fraud check — clears the claim.

beats.narration: Grace realises her luggage didn't arrive and contacts Zava Insurance.
Grace heads from the airport to the Zava Insurance Claims Office to lodge her claim.
Grace lodges her Travel — lost luggage claim.
Iris captures the airline reference and items list.
Iris routes the claim to the Claims Assessor.
Adam reviews the travel policy and item evidence.
Adam notes some items lack receipts — flagged for fraud quick-check.
Felix runs a quick fraud check — clears the claim.
Adam hands the claim to Settlement.
Seth approves a partial settlement covering the verified items.
Cara explains the partial outcome to Grace in plain English.
